title: Phase 1B: Database schema - platform core models and enums
description: Define all platform core Prisma models and enums: User, UserProfile, Location, Role, Permission, RolePermission, UserRoleAssignment, AccessScope, FeatureFlag, FeatureFlagAssignment, ApprovalPolicy, ApprovalRequest, ApprovalStep, AuditEvent, SecurityEvent, Exception, BranchSetting, UserPreference, and all supporting enums.
steps: Create prisma/schema.prisma with datasource and generator config
Define all enums: UserStatus, RoleType, PermissionType, ScopeType, ApprovalStatus, SeverityLevel, ExceptionStatus, etc.
Define User, UserProfile, Location models with relationships
Define Role, Permission, RolePermission models with RBAC structure
Define UserRoleAssignment, AccessScope models for scoped access
Define AuditEvent, SecurityEvent models for audit trail
Define Exception model for exception engine
